title: podman healthcheck run locking unsound
body:
cleanupExecBundle expects the container to be locked but execLightweight can call it unlocked causing a panic.

This flakes because cleanupExecBundle() only tries unlock on an directory removal error such as ENOTEMPTY or EBUSY

```
2026-06-23T11:25:39.6185540Z   > Enter [BeforeEach] TOP-LEVEL - /var/tmp/podman/test/e2e/common_test.go:123 @ 06/23/26 11:25:35.64
```
